title: Pan-Seared Trout with Indian Spice
description: A flavorful and healthy trout dish with an Indian twist, seared to perfection in just a few minutes.

ingredients.name: stir fry oil
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or vegetable oil

instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the trout fillets with salt and pepper.
Add the stir fry oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Add the trout fillets to the skillet, skin side up (if they have skin).
Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the skin is crispy.
Flip the trout over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
Sprinkle the fix spice blend over the top of the trout.
Squeeze the juice of the quick lemon over the top of the trout.
Serve the trout hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
